data "azurerm_storage_account" "function_storage" {
  name                = module.global_variables.resource_names.storage_account
  resource_group_name = local.env.resource_group_name
  depends_on          = [module.storage_account]
}

resource "azurerm_monitor_diagnostic_setting" "storage_table_logs" {
  name               = "WNZL-Logging-Logs"
  target_resource_id = "${data.azurerm_storage_account.function_storage.id}/tableServices/default"

  # log analytics workspace id here

  enabled_log {
    category = "StorageRead"
  }

  enabled_log {
    category = "StorageWrite"
  }

  enabled_log {
    category = "StorageDelete"
  }
}
